# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
# VPC Network
- name: app-vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

# Private Subnet
- name: app-private-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
    region: us-central1
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Cloud SQL Private IP Range
- name: sql-private-ip-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: 16
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)

# Private Services Connection for Cloud SQL
- name: private-services-connection
  type: servicenetworking.v1.connection
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/app-vpc-network
    reservedPeeringRanges:
      - sql-private-ip-range
    service: servicenetworking.googleapis.com
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
      - sql-private-ip-range
      - app-vpc-network

# Firewall - Deny all ingress by default
- name: fw-deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0

# Firewall - Allow health check from GCP health check ranges only
- name: fw-allow-health-check
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - 130.211.0.0/22
      - 35.191.0.0/16
    targetTags:
      - app-server

# Firewall - Allow load balancer to backend on HTTPS only
- name: fw-allow-lb-to-backend
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - 130.211.0.0/22
      - 35.191.0.0/16
    targetTags:
      - app-server

# Firewall - Allow internal communication within subnet
- name: fw-allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "0-65535"
      - IPProtocol: UDP
        ports:
          - "0-65535"
      - IPProtocol: ICMP
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.1.0/24

# Firewall - Allow IAP for SSH (secure alternative to opening port 22)
- name: fw-allow-iap-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"
    sourceRanges:
      - 35.235.240.0/20
    targetTags:
      - app-server

# Cloud Router for NAT
- name: app-cloud-router
  type: compute.v1.router
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    nats:
      - name: app-cloud-nat
        natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
        sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: LIST_OF_SUBNETWORKS
        subnetworks:
          - name: $(ref.app-private-subnet.selfLink)
            sourceIpRangesToNat:
              - ALL_IP_RANGES
        logConfig:
          enable: true
          filter: ERRORS_ONLY

# Service Account for Compute Instances (least privilege)
- name: app-instance-sa
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-instance-sa
    displayName: Application Instance Service Account
    projectId: {{ env["project"] }}

# IAM binding - Grant minimal Cloud SQL client role to service account
- name: app-sa-sql-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/cloudsql.client
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-instance-sa.email)

# IAM binding - Grant storage object viewer to service account
- name: app-sa-storage-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/storage.objectViewer
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-instance-sa.email)

# Cloud Storage Bucket - Application Assets
- name: {{ env["project"] }}-app-assets
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ env["project"] }}-app-assets
    location: US-CENTRAL1
    storageClass: STANDARD
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    logging:
      logBucket: {{ env["project"] }}-app-assets
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            numNewerVersions: 3
            isLive: false
    cors: []

# Cloud SQL Instance - PostgreSQL with private IP only
- name: app-sql-instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    instanceType: CLOUD_SQL_INSTANCE
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-2-7680
      availabilityType: REGIONAL
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
        pointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
        backupRetentionSettings:
          retainedBackups: 30
          retentionUnit: COUNT
        transactionLogRetentionDays: 7
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
        requireSsl: true
        sslMode: ENCRYPTED_ONLY
      dataDiskSizeGb: 50
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      storageAutoResize: true
      storageAutoResizeLimit: 200
      maintenanceWindow:
        day: 7
        hour: 4
        updateTrack: stable
      databaseFlags:
        - name: log_checkpoints
          value: "on"
        - name: log_connections
          value: "on"
        - name: log_disconnections
          value: "on"
        - name: log_lock_waits
          value: "on"
        - name: log_min_duration_statement
          value: "1000"
        - name: cloudsql.enable_pgaudit
          value: "on"
        - name: pgaudit.log
          value: "all"
      userLabels:
        environment: production
        managed-by: deployment-manager
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
      - private-services-connection

# Cloud SQL Database
- name: app-database
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
    name: appdb
    charset: UTF8
    collation: en_US.UTF8

# Cloud SQL User with restricted privileges
- name: app-sql-user
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.user
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-sql-instance.name)
    name: app_user
    host: ""
    password: CHANGE_ME_USE_SECRET_MANAGER
    type: BUILT_IN

# Instance Template for Managed Instance Group
- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
          - app-server
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: $(ref.app-instance-sa.email)
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/cos-cloud/global/images/family/cos-stable
            diskSizeGb: 20
            diskType: pd-ssd
          diskEncryptionKey: {}
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
          subnetwork: $(ref.app-private-subnet.selfLink)
          # No accessConfigs - instances have no external IP
      shieldedInstanceConfig:
        enableSecureBoot: true
        enableVtpm: true
        enableIntegrityMonitoring: true
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: enable-oslogin
            value: "TRUE"
          - key: block-project-ssh-keys
            value: "TRUE"
          - key: cos-metrics-enabled
            value: "true"
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              set -euo pipefail
              # Application startup - customize as needed
              echo "Instance startup complete" > /var/log/startup-status.log
      labels:
        environment: production
        managed-by: deployment-manager

# Health Check for Backend Service
- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTPS
    httpsHealthCheck:
      port: 443
      requestPath: /health
      proxyHeader: NONE
    checkIntervalSec: 15
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3

# Regional Managed Instance Group
- name: app-instance-group-manager
  type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    baseInstanceName: app-vm
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: 2
    distributionPolicy:
      zones:
        - zone: zones/us-central1-a
        - zone: zones/us-central1-b
        - zone: zones/us-central1-c
    autoHealingPolicies:
      - healthCheck: $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
        initialDelaySec: 300
    namedPorts:
      - name: https
        port: 443
    updatePolicy:
      type: PROACTIVE
      instanceRedistributionType: PROACTIVE
      minimalAction: REPLACE
      maxSurge:
        fixed: 1
      maxUnavailable:
        fixed: 0
      minReadySec: 60

# Regional Autoscaler
- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.regionAutoscaler
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    target: $(ref.app-instance-group-manager.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: 2
      maxNumReplicas: 6
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.65
      coolDownPeriodSec: 300

# SSL Certificate (managed)
- name: app-ssl-cert
  type: compute.v1.managedSslCertificate
  properties:
    managed:
      domains:
        - app.example.com
    type: MANAGED

# Backend Service
- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTPS
    portName: https
    healthChecks:
      - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
      - group: $(ref.app-instance-group-manager.instanceGroup)
        balancingMode: UTILIZATION
        maxUtilization: 0.8
        capacityScaler: 1.0
    sessionAffinity: NONE
    connectionDraining:
      drainingTimeoutSec: 300
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      sampleRate: 1.0
    securityPolicy: $(ref.app-cloud-armor-policy.selfLink)
    cdnPolicy:
      cacheMode: CACHE_ALL_STATIC
      defaultTtl: 3600
      maxTtl: 86400
      signedUrlCacheMaxAgeSec: 0

# Cloud Armor Security Policy
- name: app-cloud-armor-policy
  type: compute.v1.securityPolicy
  properties:
    description: Security policy for application backend
    rules:
      # Default rule - allow
      - action: allow
        priority: 2147483647
        match:
          versionedExpr: SRC_IPS_V1
          config:
            srcIpRanges:
              - "*"
        description: Default allow rule
      # Rate limiting rule
      - action: throttle
        priority: 1000
        match:
          versionedExpr: SRC_IPS_V1
          config:
            srcIpRanges:
              - "*"
        description: Rate limiting - 100 requests per minute per IP
        rateLimitOptions:
          conformAction: allow
          exceedAction: deny(429)
          rateLimitThreshold:
            count: 100
            intervalSec: 60
          enforceOnKey: IP
      # Block known bad IPs (example - customize as needed)
      - action: deny(403)
        priority: 900
        match:
          expr:
            expression: "evaluatePreconfiguredExpr('xss-v33-stable')"
        description: Block XSS attacks
      - action: deny(403)
        priority: 901
        match:
          expr:
            expression: "evaluatePreconfiguredExpr('sqli-v33-stable')"
        description: Block SQL injection attacks

# URL Map
- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

# HTTPS Target Proxy
- name: app-https-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpsProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)
    sslCertificates:
      - $(ref.app-ssl-cert.selfLink)
    sslPolicy: $(ref.app-ssl-policy.selfLink)

# SSL Policy - enforce modern TLS
- name: app-ssl-policy
  type: compute.v1.sslPolicy
  properties:
    profile: RESTRICTED
    minTlsVersion: TLS_1_2

# HTTP Target Proxy (for redirect to HTTPS)
- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-http-redirect-url-map.selfLink)

# URL Map for HTTP to HTTPS redirect
- name: app-http-redirect-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultUrlRedirect:
      httpsRedirect: true
      redirectResponseCode: MOVED_PERMANENTLY_DEFAULT
      stripQuery: false

# Global Static IP
- name: app-global-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    ipVersion: IPV4

# HTTPS Forwarding Rule
- name: app-https-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-https-proxy.selfLink)
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-global-ip.selfLink)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "443"
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

# HTTP Forwarding Rule (redirects to HTTPS)
- name: app-http-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-global-ip.selfLink)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "80"
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

outputs:
  - name: load-balancer-ip
    value: $(ref.app-global-ip.address)
  - name: sql-instance-connection-name
    value: $(ref.app-sql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: sql-instance-private-ip
    value: $(ref.app-sql-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
  - name: storage-bucket-name
    value: $(ref.{{ env["project"] }}-app-assets.name)
  - name: vpc-network
    value: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
  - name: service-account-email
    value: $(ref.app-instance-sa.email)
